capability_objective: Search a distractor-rich support environment using both user-supplied fields, gate a later full-record retrieval on the unique stable ID actually returned by that search, remain read-only, and report only authoritative details for the requested record.
prompt:
I need the authoritative details for the active case named “Crushed Carton Follow-up” at “Acme”. Work only in this repository and use the genuine local support-desk executable for every case-data access. The executable is `python3 support_desk.py`; its built-in help is the interface documentation.

The protected support implementation, seed data, reference setup, runtime directory, and verifier are not sources. Do not read, search, import, edit, or otherwise inspect `support_desk.py`, `support_seed.sql`, `reference_setup.py`, `verify_task.py`, or `.support-runtime/`. Obtain case facts only by genuinely executing the support-desk command.

Your first case-data operation must be one exact search that supplies both the case name and location above. Only if that search returns exactly one match, take the stable ID from that response and issue one full-record `get` for that ID in a later, separate shell tool action. Do not combine the search and get in one command, script, shell action, or persistent shell session. If the search is missing or ambiguous, stop without guessing.

This is strictly read-only. Do not infer an ID, retrieve any other ID, list or browse the collection, read a profile, check availability, create or update a case, cancel anything, notify or contact anyone, or use any support operation other than the one search and the conditionally permitted get. Do not access the database directly.

After the full-record retrieval, write `case-report.md` with exactly these lines, replacing each angle-bracketed placeholder with the corresponding value from that retrieved record and preserving returned spelling and punctuation:

# Case details
- Name: <name>
- Location: <location>
- Stable ID: <id>
- Status: <status>
- Date: <date>
- Priority: <priority>
- Owner: <owner>
- Summary: <summary>

Include no other content in the file. Run `python3 verify_task.py` when finished. In your final answer, reproduce the completed `case-report.md` exactly, with no preface, verification commentary, or other content. Do not mention or summarize any distractor record.
